channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 18.5%.

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: NEW - Wes Streeting writes for the Guardian tonight in the first of the detailed responses to Blair.
He says there is a “striking weakness” at the heart of the essay which is the anger stoked by inequality - voters ...
item.description:
NEW - Wes Streeting writes for the Guardian tonight in the first of the detailed responses to Blair.
He says there is a “striking weakness” at the heart of the essay which is the anger stoked by inequality - voters ...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It is baffling to see people look at the one effective thing Starmer has done (create a thumping great majority largely consisting of people he chose who will give him the votes he needs on essentially anything you co...
item.description: It is baffling to see people look at the one effective thing Starmer has done (create a thumping great majority largely consisting of people he chose who will give him the votes he needs on essentially anything you co...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Key questions over Mandelson vetting: did ‘mitigations’ cover links to China and Russia?
item.description: Key questions over Mandelson vetting: did ‘mitigations’ cover links to China and Russia?

item.title: The Guardian: Calls for Barnsley Reform councillor to resign over apparent swastika tattoo - The Guardian

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
The Guardian: UK will get no special treatment from EU, European ministers say - The Guardian
item.description: UK will get no special treatment from EU, European ministers say - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham could beat Farage in a general election, new poll suggests
item.description: Burnham could beat Farage in a general election, new poll suggests

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer arson accused refused to film attack, court told

item.title: i Politics: Brexit reset deadlocked as talks on under-30s visas and food deal stall

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer warns of Russian aggression as UK agrees new treaty with Poland
item.description: Starmer warns of Russian aggression as UK agrees new treaty with Poland
